title: ononis hirta var. prostrata
intro: Ononis hirta var. prostrata, also known as the prostrate restharrow or creeping restharrow, is a low-growing, hairy perennial plant that belongs to the legume family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to its high content of alkaloids and flavonoids. Consuming the plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing pain and swelling, treating wounds, and supporting urinary health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
